# Fixture: CCD-code ligand and templates

Exercises a CCD-code ligand (as opposed to SMILES) and the Templates field.
The template path is a placeholder -- this fixture is for parser/schema
verification only, not a real `boltz predict` run.

Settings:
Output folder: ./boltz_yamls
Predict affinity: no

Protein: TPLP
Sequence: MASNNTASIAQARKLVEQLKMEANIDRIKVSKAAADLMAYCEAHAKEDPLLTPVPASENPFREKKFFCAIL
Templates: reference_structure.cif

Ligand: GOL1
CCD: GOL
